name: 霸氣護妹宣言型
description: 母親或兄長對假千金一方發出的強硬警告和最後通牒，明確站隊真千金。這類對白滿足觀眾對『有人撐腰』的心理需求。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Xie Lan, Xie An / You need to appear in front of Xixi within half an hour. / Otherwise, don't acknowledge me as your mother.
